name: CSS
format:
<style>

    /* Logo en header */
    header.v-app-bar .v-toolbar__title {
    font-size: 0 !important;
    width: 220px !important;
    height: 50px !important;
    background-image: url('/logoE2025_mix.png') !important;
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
    background-position: center !important;
    display: block !important;
    }

    .v-app-bar__content .v-toolbar__title,
    .v-app-bar .v-toolbar__title,
    .nrdb-app-bar__title,
    [class*="toolbar__title"] {
    font-size: 0 !important;
    width: 220px !important;
    height: 50px !important;
    background-image: url('/logoE2025_mix.png') !important;
    //background-image: url('/footerArduino.PNG') !important;
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
    background-position: center !important;
    display: block !important;
    }



    /* ===== SWITCHES ESTILO INDUSTRIAL METÁLICO ===== */

    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-switch__track {
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
                #2a2a2a 0%, #1a1a1a 50%, #111 100%) !important;
        border: 2px solid transparent !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 2px #555,
            0 0 0 4px #333,
            inset 0 3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
            inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
        height: 20px !important;
        width: 90px !important;
        border-radius: 16px !important;
        opacity: 1 !important;
    }

    /* Thumb OFF - gris metálico */
    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-switch__thumb {
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
                #e0e0e0 0%, #bdbdbd 40%, #9e9e9e 70%, #757575 100%) !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 2px #888,
            0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7),
            inset 0 1px 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important;
        width: 18px !important;
        height: 18px !important;
        border-radius: 50% !important;
    }

    /* Thumb ON - verde brillante */
    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-switch__thumb.bg-primary {
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
                #a5d6a7 0%, #66bb6a 40%, #388e3c 70%, #1b5e20 100%) !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 2px #2e7d32,
            0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7),
            0 0 12px rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.8),
            inset 0 1px 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important;
    }

    /* Texto OFF */
    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-switch__track::before {
        content: 'OFF' !important;
        position: absolute !important;
        right: 8px !important;
        top: 50% !important;
        transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
        font-size: 9px !important;
        font-weight: bold !important;
        color: #555 !important;
        letter-spacing: 1px !important;
        pointer-events: none !important;
    }

    /* Texto ON */
    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-input--dirty .v-switch__track::before {
        content: 'ON' !important;
        left: 8px !important;
        right: auto !important;
        color: #666 !important;
    }

    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-input__control {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)) !important;
    }


    /* ===== BOTONES ESTILO CRISTAL AZUL ===== */

    .nrdb-ui-button .v-btn {
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
                #6ab4f5 0%, #1a6fc4 40%, #0d47a1 70%, #083080 100%) !important;
        border: 3px solid transparent !important;
        border-radius: 12px !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 3px #b0bec5,
            0 0 0 5px #78909c,
            0 0 0 7px #455a64,
            0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
            inset 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4),
            inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) !important;
        position: relative !important;
        overflow: hidden !important;
        min-width: 80px !important;
        height: 48px !important;
        transition: all 0.2s ease !important;
    }

    /* Reflejo cristal */
    .nrdb-ui-button .v-btn::before {
        content: '' !important;
        position: absolute !important;
        top: 8% !important;
        left: 15% !important;
        width: 65% !important;
        height: 35% !important;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) 0%,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 100%) !important;
        border-radius: 50% !important;
        filter: blur(3px) !important;
        pointer-events: none !important;
    }

    .nrdb-ui-button .v-btn:hover {
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
                #90caf9 0%, #42a5f5 40%, #1565c0 70%, #0d47a1 100%) !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 3px #cfd8dc,
            0 0 0 5px #90a4ae,
            0 0 0 7px #607d8b,
            0 6px 25px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.7),
            inset 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5),
            inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) !important;
        transform: scale(1.05) !important;
    }

    .nrdb-ui-button .v-btn:active {
        transform: scale(0.96) !important;
        box-shadow:
            0 0 0 3px #b0bec5,
            0 0 0 5px #78909c,
            0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
            inset 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) !important;
    }

    .nrdb-ui-button .v-btn .v-btn__content {
        color: white !important;
        font-weight: bold !important;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) !important;
        font-size: 13px !important;
        z-index: 1 !important;
    }
    .nrdb-ui-switch .v-switch__track {
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
    #2a2a2a 0%, #1a1a1a 50%, #111 100%) !important;
    border: 4px solid transparent !important;
    box-shadow:
    0 0 0 2px #909090,
    0 0 0 4px #555,
    0 0 0 6px #333,
    inset 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
    inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.08) !important;
    height: 24px !important;
    width: 100px !important;
    border-radius: 18px !important;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    }


    /* ===== PROGRESS BAR ESTILO NEÓN ===== */
    
    /* Contenedor exterior */
    .nrdb-ui-progress .v-progress-linear {
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
    #1a1a2e 0%, #0d0d1a 100%) !important;
    border-radius: 20px !important;
    box-shadow:
    0 0 0 2px #4fc3f7,
    0 0 0 4px #0277bd,
    0 0 15px rgba(79, 195, 247, 0.4),
    inset 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important;
    height: 28px !important;
    padding: 4px !important;
    }
    
    /* Barra de relleno */
    .nrdb-ui-progress .v-progress-linear__determinate {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
    #1565c0 0%,
    #1e88e5 25%,
    #42a5f5 50%,
    #80deea 75%,
    #b2ebf2 100%) !important;
    border-radius: 20px !important;
    box-shadow:
    0 0 8px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.9),
    0 0 20px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.5) !important;
    position: relative !important;
    }
    
    /* Efecto puntitos/segmentos */
    .nrdb-ui-progress .v-progress-linear__determinate::after {
    content: '' !important;
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    right: 0 !important;
    bottom: 0 !important;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    90deg,
    transparent 0px,
    transparent 8px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 8px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 10px
    ) !important;
    border-radius: 20px !important;
    }
    
    /* Fondo gris de la parte vacía */
    .nrdb-ui-progress .v-progress-linear__background {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
    #263238 0%, #37474f 50%, #455a64 100%) !important;
    border-radius: 20px !important;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    }
    
    /* Texto del porcentaje */
    .nrdb-ui-progress .v-progress-linear__content {
    color: white !important;
    font-weight: bold !important;
    font-size: 12px !important;
    letter-spacing: 2px !important;
    text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.8) !important;
    }

    .sin-borde {
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    }


    /* Quitar recuadro blanco de la progress bar */
    .nrdb-ui-progress-wrapper {
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    }
    
    .nrdb-ui-progress.sin-borde {
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    }
    
    .sin-borde .nrdb-ui-progress-wrapper {
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    }

    /* START - verde */
.btn-start .v-btn {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #a5d6a7 0%, #43a047 40%, #1b5e20 70%, #0a3d0a 100%) !important;
}
.btn-start .v-btn:hover {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #c8e6c9 0%, #66bb6a 40%, #2e7d32 70%, #1b5e20 100%) !important;
    box-shadow:
        0 0 0 3px #a5d6a7,
        0 0 0 5px #66bb6a,
        0 0 0 7px #388e3c,
        0 6px 25px rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.7),
        inset 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5),
        inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) !important;
}

/* STOP - rojo */
.btn-stop .v-btn {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #ef9a9a 0%, #e53935 40%, #b71c1c 70%, #7f0000 100%) !important;
}
.btn-stop .v-btn:hover {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #ffcdd2 0%, #ef5350 40%, #c62828 70%, #b71c1c 100%) !important;
    box-shadow:
        0 0 0 3px #ef9a9a,
        0 0 0 5px #e57373,
        0 0 0 7px #ef5350,
        0 6px 25px rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.7),
        inset 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5),
        inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) !important;
}

/* SWITCH EMERGENCIA - thumb ON rojo */
.sw-emergencia .v-switch__thumb.bg-primary {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #ef9a9a 0%, #e53935 40%, #b71c1c 70%, #7f0000 100%) !important;
    box-shadow:
        0 0 0 2px #c62828,
        0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7),
        0 0 12px rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.9),
        inset 0 1px 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) !important;
}

.btn-jog .v-btn {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #fff59d 0%, #fdd835 40%, #f9a825 70%, #f57f17 100%) !important;
}
.btn-jog .v-btn:hover {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
        #ffff8d 0%, #ffee58 40%, #fbc02d 70%, #f9a825 100%) !important;
}
</style>
